items.title: MONA L03欧洲上市 小鹏拓展物理AI全球版图
items.summary: Daily Sina collector selected this with score=7, theme=physical_ai, lane=claim_graph. Verify exact article before use. Signals: +4:物理ai, +3:机器人. Intro: 会上，小鹏集团展示了包括智能汽车、飞行汽车、具身机器人在内的科技产品矩阵，同时小鹏旗下的MONA L03（含纯电和增程版本）宣布全球上市，面向65个国家和地区销售，其中中国市场售价12.38万元起... Treat as an unverified public AI claim; import into claim-gate and keep it verify-first until independent evidence is attached.
